reference.title: Changelog
reference.shortdesc: Track changes to the documentation and API behavior.

ul.li: Added <prolog> metadata (author, dates, keywords) to all 15 topics.
Added inline <xref> cross-references throughout body text for contextual navigation.
Wired orphaned assets/examples/ JSON files into endpoint references via <coderef>.
Added <related-links> to all 14 key topics for end-of-topic navigation.
Added response examples (with HTTP status codes) to every endpoint in the three reference files.
Created shared/reusable-content.dita conref warehouse with base URL, idempotency, and error response fragments.

Applied conref reuse across 5 topics (,

, and patterns).
Added <note> elements (tip, important, remember, restriction, caution) across 7 files.
Added <context> to all 5 task topics explaining when and why to perform each task.
Standardized endpoint parameter documentation: consistent <simpletable> format for query parameters (3 columns) and request body fields (4 columns).
Created DITA starter kit (concepts, tasks, reference, ditamap).
